title: Broadcaster
description: Broadcaster is a lightweight and easy-to-use Minecraft plugin that allows server admins to send clear and eye-catching announcements to all players.
body:
# Broadcaster Plugin

Broadcaster is an easy-to-use Minecraft plugin that lets you send messages to all players in a clean and visible way.

## Features
- `/bc chat <text>` → Sends a message to all players with spaces above and below for better visibility  
- `/bc title "title" "subtitle"` → Displays a title and optional subtitle on the screen  
- `/bc clear` → Removes active broadcast titles from players  
- Alias: `/bc` instead of `/broadcast`  
- Only OP players can use the commands  

## Description
This plugin is designed to be simple, lightweight, and useful for announcements on your server.

## Contacts
If you find any bugs or need help, join my discord server for support
